creator: tps@vr-web.de
text:
Checking for packages with security vulnerabilities:
pkg: http://vuxml.freebsd.org/freebsd/vuln.xml.bz2: No route to host
pkg: cannot fetch vulnxml file

The server is reachable if the given proxy where used. Seems this part of the system ignores proxy variables. In tune fetching fails.
The "No route to host" message seems wrong.
